title: Explain the key dimensions of ethics. Discuss their relevance in decision-making in public administration.
description: Q7. Explain the key dimensions of ethics. Discuss their relevance in decision-making in public administration. (10 M) Difficulty Level: Medium Reference: InsightsIAS Why the question Ethics forms the foundation of public administration, and understanding its dimensions is essential to address contemporary governance challenges involving accountability, transparency, and integrity.
